title: Aluseg MCP Tool Specification
description: Open, machine-readable specification for the MCP tools exposed by an Aluseg-compatible rental-management backend. Any backend implementing this schema can be served by the Aluseg MCP reference server.

tools.name: verify_parties
tools.description: Authenticate and verify the identity of the landlord and tenant before any contract or payment action.

landlord_nif.description: Portuguese tax ID (NIF) of the landlord

tenant_nif.description: Portuguese tax ID (NIF) of the tenant

oauth_token.description: Per-user OAuth 2.0 bearer token; never a shared service credential

tools.constraint: Requires OAuth 2.0 authentication; parses eIDAS-compliant digital signatures where available.

tools.name: generate_lease
tools.description: Compile verified party and property metadata into a standardized Portuguese rental contract draft.

draftUrl.description: Secure URL to an eIDAS-signable draft PDF

tools.constraint: Restricted to verified owners. Always returns a draft for human review; never auto-executes or auto-signs.

tools.name: notify_tax_authority
tools.description: Submit a signed lease contract to the Portuguese Tax and Customs Authority (AT) for mandatory registration.

at_credentials_token.description: Short-lived, scoped token — never a raw AT password

tools.constraint: Requires active, explicit, time-bounded consent from the landlord before submission.

tools.name: propose_unpaid_insurance
tools.description: Assess tenant default risk from consented data and return unpaid-rent insurance quotes.

tenant_consent_token.description: Explicit, time-bounded consent token (e.g. PSD2 open-banking scope)

tools.constraint: Requires explicit, time-bounded user consent. Uses only permitted data; no data retained beyond the scored request.

tools.name: get_rent_status
tools.description: Read rent-payment status for a property over a given period.
tools.constraint: Read-only; scoped to properties the authenticated user owns or manages.
